name: The Cottage Schnitzel
recipeIngredient: Salt, white pepper, nutmeg, and freshly chopped parsley to taste
2 pounds Pork tenderloin, trimmed of excess fat and dusted with flour
Freshly squeezed lemon juice as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the batter: In a blender container, combine eggs, flour, Parmesan cheese, milk, salt, white pepper, nutmeg, and parsley. Blend together at high speed for 2 minutes.
2. Slice the pork tenderloin into thin medallions (approximately 3-inch/8-centimeter).
3. Dip each medallion first in flour, then coat with the prepared batter.
4. Melt enough butter to cover the bottom of a heavy frying pan over medium-high heat.
5. Quickly sauté the medallions in the butter until browned on each side, turning occasionally.
6. Remove the medallions to a serving tray using tongs or a spatula.
7. Deglaze the frying pan with lemon juice and pour the juices over the pork medallions.
8. Serve immediately.
